quotes:
three approved brand colors in hierarchy order are: (1) 
#00529B Deep Blue (dominant), (2) 
#FAA31B Amber Orange (secondary accent), (3) 
#FFC60A Golden Yellow (tertiary accent)

The three approved brand colors in hierarchy order are: (1) 
#00529B Deep Blue (dominant), (2) 
#FAA31B Amber Orange (secondary accent), (3) 
#FFC60A Golden Yellow (tertiary accent).

rules.intent: Maintain the prescribed color dominance hierarchy across all banner materials.
rules.rule_text: The brand colors must adhere strictly to the established hierarchy: Deep Blue (color.primary.brand_blue = #00529b) is dominant, followed by Amber Orange (color.primary.sunshine = #faa31b) as the secondary accent, and Golden Yellow (color.primary.gold = #ffc60a) as the tertiary accent.

quotes:
Agenda, is the primary headline font
and should be used for all headlines and headers.

Agenda, is the primary headline font
and should be used for all headlines and headers.

rules.intent: Establish consistent branding through uniform headline typography.
rules.rule_text: Agenda (font.family.agenda = 'Agenda') is the primary headline font and must be used for all headlines and headers.

quotes:
Nunito Sans should be used for
all body copy in print.

Nunito Sans should be used for
all body copy in print.

rules.intent: Maintain readability and brand styling in print materials.
rules.rule_text: Nunito Sans (font.family.nunito_sans = 'Nunito Sans') should be used for all body copy in print layouts.

quotes: use this shape and treatment for CTAs:

<svg width="180" height="59" viewBox="0 0 180 59" fill="none" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"> <path d="M0 25C0 11.1929 11.1929 0 25 0H177.5C178.605 0 179.5 0.895431 179.5 2V33.5C179.5 47.3071 168.307 58.5 154.5 58.5H2C0.895433 58.5 0 57.6046 0 56.5V25Z" fill="url(#paint0_linear_75_5202)"/> <defs> <linearGradient id="paint0_linear_75_5202" x1="0" y1="29.25" x2="179.5" y2="29.25" gradientUnits="userSpaceOnUse"> <stop stop-color="`#FFDF55`"/> <stop offset="1" stop-color="`#FAA21B`"/> </linearGradient> </defs> </svg>

rules.intent: Reinforce brand call-to-action sections with the unique signature asymmetric gradient button design.
rules.rule_text: CTA buttons must use the specified asymmetric SVG shape with a linear gradient spanning from SVG Yellow (color.cta.svg_yellow = #FFDF55) to SVG Orange (color.cta.svg_orange = #FAA21B).
